probes.evidence: Pro annual checkout returns buy.polar.sh URL.

code_build.evidence: npm run build passed locally after production gate updates.

site_registry.evidence: site-registry updated to active_cloudflare and includeInPatrol:true.

polar_checkout.evidence: Six Polar checkout secrets configured; live /api/checkout returned buy.polar.sh URL.

cloudflare_deploy.evidence: Cloudflare Worker deployed with D1 and Assets bindings.

dns_https_apex_www.evidence: Apex HTTPS 200; www 301 to apex; parent DS empty and Cloudflare NS visible.

browser_main_flow.evidence: Codex in-app browser timed out repeatedly; production Chrome CDP fallback passed homepage, mobile, pricing, Polar checkout ready, and planner paid gate.

performance_gate.evidence: Chrome CDP production smoke passed desktop/mobile layout with no horizontal overflow.

trust_content_gate.evidence: source boundaries, terms, privacy, support, and non-affiliation copy present.

keyword_validation.evidence: Google Trends same-request MiroFish validation attempted; direct fetch timed out and curl fallback returned HTTP 429, so no traffic keywords were counted.

backlink_distribution.evidence: Backlink ledger records confirmed GitHub/docs links and backlink-only external exceptions; no paid, reciprocal, security-bypass, or direct-email action was taken.

final_response_consistency.evidence: Final response must not call all Skill steps fully complete while keyword validation or in-app browser flow remains blocked.
